title: I Want a Podcast
tagline: Read the book and let's build.
description: One universal path. Six costumes. The story follows you.

claude-code.label: Claude Code
claude-code.paste_method: Write it in a file. The agent reads the file.

codex.label: Codex CLI
codex.paste_method: Write it in a file. The agent reads the file.

gemini-cli.label: Gemini CLI
gemini-cli.paste_method: Write it in a file. The agent reads the file.

cowork.label: Claude Cowork
cowork.install: Download Claude desktop app from claude.ai
cowork.launch: Open the Claude app and start a Cowork session
cowork.paste_method: Paste into the chat, or point it at a file on your desktop.

chatgpt.label: ChatGPT
chatgpt.install: Go to chatgpt.com and sign in

notebooklm.label: NotebookLM
notebooklm.install: Go to notebooklm.google.com and sign in
notebooklm.paste_method: Upload your sources. NotebookLM writes its own script.
notebooklm.note: NotebookLM generates its own podcast. You don't control the script, voices, or assembly. Fast. Unsteerable.

web.label: Web Browser
web.desc: The parrot. Talks but can't reach. Everything is copy-paste.

desktop.label: Desktop App
desktop.desc: Has some file access. Can see your screen. Can't run scripts.

cli.label: Command Line
cli.desc: The octopus. Reads files, runs commands, builds things.

free.label: Free tier
free.notes: Gemini CLI (preview), ChatGPT free, Claude.ai free. Limited. Enough for the map.

paid.label: Subscription
paid.notes: Pro/Plus plans. More tokens, more features, less friction.

byok.label: Bring your own key
byok.notes: API key. Pay per token. No subscription. Full control.

capability_matrix._note: What each interface level can do. This drives the evaluate step.

universal_path.title: Why a podcast?
universal_path.notes: Story circle. What makes an episode. The conductor. Not an orbit.

universal_path.title: What do you have?
universal_path.notes: Capability detection. What tools exist on your machine right now? What subscriptions do you have? What can you get for free? This determines the path. Three axes: interface (web/desktop/cli), provider (anthropic/openai/google), and cost (free/paid/bring-your-own-key). The output is: you are HERE on the map.

universal_path.title: Get set up
universal_path.notes: Universal framing + tool-specific install steps injected.

universal_path.title: A file and a folder
universal_path.notes: Create your project folder. Create your first file. The system exists.

universal_path.title: Write the script
universal_path.notes: Script format is universal. How you write it differs. NLM replaces this with source curation.

universal_path.title: Voice it
universal_path.notes: THE HARD FORK. Truly different per family.

universal_path.title: Assemble
universal_path.notes: CLI gets the full pipeline. Everyone else gets simpler. NLM skips.

universal_path.title: Publish
universal_path.notes: Mostly converges. You have an MP3. Put it somewhere.

universal_path.title: What's next
universal_path.notes: Steering file. Skill. The second episode starts from where this one ended.

template_variables._note: These are replaced in all content files at render time.

lecture.label: The Lecture
lecture.desc: Narrator reads the guide straight. No dialogue. Clean, linear, listenable on a walk.

conversation.label: The Conversation
conversation.desc: Karen and the narrator talk through it. Karen asks the questions the listener would ask.
conversation.karen_role: curious learner who asks good questions

workshop.label: The Workshop
workshop.desc: Karen is the hands. She executes live. Narrator explains what's happening. Pair programming as audio.
workshop.karen_role: the agent doing the work, reporting what she sees

encounters.label: The Encounter Table
encounters.desc: Self-contained 2-3 min situations. Not linear. Roll a d20. Land on the one you need.
encounters.structure: collection of independent scenes, not a path
encounters.notes: Each encounter is: situation, what went wrong (or what you want), what to do, what to say to the agent. Shuffleable. Searchable. The anti-curriculum for people who already have a tool.

steps: 2. For each section: load the universal file
3. If section has inserts: load the insert file for the selected family
5. Replace all {{TEMPLATE_VARIABLES}} with tool config values
6. If depth=short: truncate each section to first paragraph + first insert paragraph
7. Output: one rendered page or one audiobook script
